---
title: "Publicaciones"
description: "Artículos, capítulos y reportes del semillero MetaCiencia"
toc: false
listing:
  id: pubs-listing
  contents: "*.qmd"
  exclude:
    filename: "index.qmd"
  type: table
  fields: [date, title, description, categories]
  sort: "date desc"
  date-format: "YYYY"
---

::: {#pubs-listing}
:::
